overview.description: The Innovator Premium Income 30 Barrier ETF - October (OCTJ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The fund seeks to provide a consistent income stream and a limited protective barrier against losses over a one-year period. The actively managed fund holds a package of S&P 500 FLEX options and US Treasurys. OCTJ was launched on Sep 30, 2023 and is issued by Innovator.
